char_overview: Specializing in miniaturized and concealable weapons. A former watchmaker who applies micro-engineering principles to 灵能 armaments.
char_looks: 159cm. Dark brown bob cut, always tucked behind ears Small, fine-boned face. Amber eyes habitually narrowed in focus. Fitted navy workshop coat, high-collared white blouse, gray slacks, flat-soled leather shoes. None.
char_flaws: Obsessive to the point of paralysis; Refuses any project larger than her palm.; Measures everything with calipers before touching; Talks to components by their part numbers; Keeps failed prototypes in labeled jars.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-微视: Perceives 灵力回路 at microscopic resolutions, allowing her to engrave 灵力回路 patterns on pins, needles, and other sub-centimeter surfaces. Precision decreases with scale, optimal range is under 5cm.
char_mission: Push the limits of weapon miniaturization, fulfill commissions that require concealment, precision, and unconventional form factors.
char_origin: Trained as a watchmaker in Kyoto before awakening her 灵能 at 22. Discovered she could perceive 灵力回路 at microscopic scales. Established 蜂巢工坊 with 狩灵协会3科 certification, specializing in miniaturized weapons that other 工坊s consider unfeasible.

char_relationships.星流: Client, designed 落辰 to accommodate 星流's unstable 灵力 reserves, building a variable-output mechanism that most 工坊s refused to attempt. Considers the project her finest work.
char_relationships.狩灵协会3科: Certified 工坊, maintains proper certification but finds the 科's inspection procedures tedious. Files all paperwork with grudging precision.
